basicDetails.schemeName: Dr. S.K. Mukherjee Scholarship for B.Sc. Agriculture Students (2nd & 3rd Year)
basicDetails.implementingAgency: Govind Ballabh Pant University Of Agriculture And Technology, Pantnagar

schemeContent.detailedDescription_md: The “Dr. S.K. Mukherjee Scholarship for B.Sc. Agriculture Students (2nd & 3rd Year)” scheme is implemented by Govind Ballabh Pant University of Agriculture and Technology, Pantnagar, under the Department of Agriculture, Government of Uttarakhand. The scheme aims to provide financial support to meritorious students pursuing a B.Sc. Agriculture course in their 2nd and 3rd years of study by awarding a one-year scholarship.
schemeContent.briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide financial support to meritorious students pursuing a B.Sc. Agriculture course in their 2nd and 3rd years of study by awarding a one-year scholarship of ₹1,100 per month.

children.text: The “Dr. S.K. Mukherjee Scholarship for B.Sc. Agriculture Students (2nd & 3rd Year)” scheme is implemented by Govind Ballabh Pant University of Agriculture and Technology, Pantnagar, under the Department of Agriculture, Government of Uttarakhand. The scheme aims to provide financial support to meritorious students pursuing a B.Sc. Agriculture course in their 2nd and 3rd years of study by awarding a one-year scholarship.

Students are first invited to submit their applications on the prescribed form. A committee, constituted by the Vice Chancellor, then reviews and evaluates these applications following a defined procedure. Based on the committee’s recommendations, the Vice Chancellor grants approval, after which the students receive their payments.

applicationProcess.process_md: Students are first invited to submit their applications on the prescribed form. A committee, constituted by the Vice Chancellor, then reviews and evaluates these applications following a defined procedure. Based on the committee’s recommendations, the Vice Chancellor grants approval, after which the students receive their payments.

eligibilityCriteria.eligibilityDescription_md: 1. The applicant must be a student. 1. The applicant must be enrolled in the 2nd or 3rd year of a B.Sc. Agriculture course at Govind Ballabh Pant University of Agriculture and Technology, Pantnagar. 1. The scholarship is awarded for a duration of one year only.

children.text: The applicant must be a student.
The applicant must be enrolled in the 2nd or 3rd year of a B.Sc. Agriculture course at Govind Ballabh Pant University of Agriculture and Technology, Pantnagar.
The scholarship is awarded for a duration of one year only.
